fields.title: Ralph should keep iteration ownership across handled child-session ends
fields.description: When a Ralph child session hits a handled tool error or otherwise ends a turn without calling ralph_done, Ralph currently pauses the loop immediately and clears child-session ownership. The same child session can still continue later, but ralph_done then reports 'No active Ralph loop.' Ralph should keep the iteration active across ordinary child-session agent_end events and only break the loop on real termination/failure conditions such as session shutdown or other unhandled fatal exits.
